steps.title: Use the examples
steps.content: The examples describe musicians incorporating powwow music into electronic dance music and combining Indigenous flute and vocals with electronic music. The blank needs a verb meaning to blend musical styles.

steps.title: Choose the blending verb
steps.content: Choice B means overstate, choice C means examine, and choice D means obtain. None describes combining musical traditions into one style. The remaining choice means merge or blend distinct things together. The answer is A.
